moments.author: Donald J. Trump
moments.quote: The Trump Economy is soaring! The stock market just delivered its best quarter since my previous term as president.
moments.why: Markets rallied strongly, and Trump’s claim attempts to take credit—it's a bold statement likely to spark debate about economic leadership.

moments.author: Mauricio Pochettino
moments.quote: Moments like Fourth of July remind us what this team represents. Happy Independence Day! 48 hours to go ⏱️
moments.why: The U.S. Men’s Soccer coach rallied national pride ahead of a key World Cup knockout match, fueling fan excitement.

moments.author: LeBron James
moments.why: LeBron’s quick social media shout-out from the golf course kept fans engaged amid his free agency uncertainty.

moments.author: Brendan Porath
moments.quote: Michael Block’s haircut this week at the U.S. Senior Open.
moments.why: The unique “USA” haircut on a tournament participant became a lighthearted, viral moment blending sports and patriotism.
